case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ALICIA CAROLINA SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,185.40 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ALICIA CAROLINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ALICIA CAROLINA SANCHEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED JUN-21-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ALICIA CAROLINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ALICIA CAROLINA $1,918.40 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,063.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
